mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_no, o.order_date, o.cust_cd, c.cust_nm, o.status, o.total_amt, o.remark, o.created_by, o.created_at FROM tb_sales_order o LEFT JOIN tb_customer c ON o.cust_cd = c.cust_cd
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC, o.order_no DESC

SELECT o.order_no, o.order_date, o.cust_cd, c.cust_nm, o.status, o.total_amt, o.remark, o.created_by, o.created_at FROM tb_sales_order o LEFT JOIN tb_customer c ON o.cust_cd = c.cust_cd WHERE o.order_no = #{order_no}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_sales_order WHERE order_no = #{order_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_sales_order (order_no, order_date, cust_cd, cust_nm, status, total_amt, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (#{order_no}, #{order_date}, #{cust_cd}, #{cust_nm}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), COALESCE(#{total_amt}, 0), #{remark}, #{user_id}, NOW(), #{user_id}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_sales_order SET order_date = #{order_date}, cust_cd = #{cust_cd}, cust_nm = #{cust_nm}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{user_id}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{order_no}
mapper.select: SELECT order_no, seq, item_cd, item_nm, qty, unit_price, amount FROM tb_sales_order_item WHERE order_no = #{order_no} ORDER BY seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_sales_order_item (order_no, seq, item_cd, item_nm, qty, unit_price, amount, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (#{order_no}, #{seq}, #{item_cd}, #{item_nm}, #{qty}, #{unit_price}, #{amount}, #{user_id}, NOW(), #{user_id}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT hist_seq, order_no, action, action_detail, action_by, action_at FROM tb_order_history WHERE order_no = #{order_no} ORDER BY action_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order_history (order_no, action, action_detail, action_by, action_at) VALUES (#{order_no}, #{action}, #{action_detail}, #{user_id}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_sales_order SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{order_no}
